full_text:
Yu Yi (Shaoran) 庾嶷 (劭然)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Yu Yi (庾嶷), styledShaoran (劭然). From Yingchuan, served as Minister Chamberlain. Yu Yi was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom.
